overall.description: A first-person perspective video game sequence showing exploration through a narrow desert canyon with a waterway. The player moves through shallow water and along rocky shores, with steep canyon walls rising on both sides under a clear blue sky. PlayStation UI elements (L2/R2 prompts) are visible at the bottom of the screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon waterway with steep rock walls

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow canyon water moving steadily forward between the rock walls

entered.detail: steep rocky canyon wall rising vertically on the left side
steep rocky canyon wall rising vertically on the right side
calm dark water filling the canyon floor with gentle ripples
narrow opening between the canyon walls showing distant mountains

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view moving through a narrow canyon waterway. Steep rocky walls rise on both sides framing a distant mountain vista ahead. The water surface is calm with gentle ripples reflecting the clear sky above.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon shoreline beside the water

events.description: exits the water onto the rocky canyon shore on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking along the dry rocky canyon floor parallel to the water's edge

entered.detail: dry sandy and rocky terrain forming the canyon floor

segments.scene_description: The player transitions from water to dry land, walking along the rocky canyon shoreline. The water remains visible to the left while the path continues on sandy terrain between the towering rock walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon waterway with steep rock walls

events.description: steps back into the shallow water from the rocky shore

agents.ego_description: re-entering the canyon water and continuing forward through the narrow passage

entered.detail: calm dark water filling the canyon floor

segments.scene_description: The player moves back into the shallow water, continuing the journey through the canyon. The water surface returns to dominate the foreground while the canyon walls close in slightly as the path progresses toward the distant opening.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a narrow desert canyon, transitioning from a waterway to a rocky shoreline and back into the shallows. It begins by gliding through a calm waterway where steep rocky walls frame a distant mountain vista under a clear sky. As the camera moves forward, the perspective shifts from the rippling water onto the dry, sandy terrain of the canyon shoreline. The scene then transitions back into the shallow water, which returns to dominate the foreground as the towering walls close in slightly. Finally, the camera continues its steady progression through the water toward the distant opening of the canyon.
